title: 60cm Christmas Wreath Decorated with Gold Berries, Poinsettia, Eucalyptus Leaves, Pine Cones, Grapevine - Front Door Room Wall Home Hanging Xmas Decorations
features: 🎄 This Christmas hanging decorations has special design, featuring gold berries, Poinsettia, eucalyptus leaves, pine needles and pine cones. The base is durable grapevine, easy to shape and hanging.

🎄 This Xmas Gold Poinsettia wreath is suitable for front door, wall, indoors, outdoors, window, fireplace, mantels, farmhouse, living room, porch, centrepiece party, wedding, Christmas, winter holiday, Thanksgiving, Xmas festival celebration.

🎄 Add this festive wreath to your Christmas decor this holiday season It will add a touch of nature and some sparkle to your holiday season. Remember that wreaths like these can be personalized further with additional decorations like ribbons, bows, or even small LED lights to create a truly enchanting display.
🎄 It measures 60cm (24inch) after fluffing. If used outdoors, please make sure to hang it under the cover to avoid rain and snow.
🎄 Since the wreath is packed in a relatively small box to satisfy transportation requirement, you need to expand the branches and adjust pine needles into best shape for optimal fullness.
description: Versatile Decor: Adorn your front door, mantle, or wall with this 60cm wreath to instantly transform any space into a welcoming haven. Whether for holidays, special occasions, or everyday elegance, this wreath is a versatile masterpiece. Thoughtful Gift: Spread the joy of nature-inspired decor with this wreath, an ideal gift that encapsulates both the beauty of the outdoors and the comfort of home.
